TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_id'id, title = id'id, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/id'id} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:зғӨ) id'id han ku tulakuk asu'. з”ЁзғӨзҡ„йӣһиӮүжүҚеҘҪеҗғ.
S.PHON: (kamu nu Д§ur~Йҫam:*) idК”~КЎid Д§an ku tur~Йҫakuk asuК”~КЎ. ********.
